content.en:
Whew!!

Ye Tian's five replica bodies condensed and came together to besiege this ancient giant bird.

Even so, the five replica bodies couldn't defeat this ancient giant bird, so at most they would hold on for a while.

At the same time, his sixth copy body was looking for a possible third-order Supreme Dao Rule item, and once it was found, it would be a great opportunity for him!

Moreover, he has no restriction on quality, even if it is the lowest quality third order supreme rule item, he also wants it.

Time passed slowly, and Ye Tian completely ignored other resources, unless they were really precious, he would take the time to pick them.

"A replica body has been killed!"

Ye Tian frowned.

Time is running out, he must find the third sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items as soon as possible!

Some time later, a second replica body was killed.

Then there is the third replica body, and the fourth replica body.

Just when the fifth copy body was about to be killed, Ye Tian finally found the third sequence of Dao Rule items.

"There really is a third sequence of Supreme Dao Rule items. "

It was a piece of bronze-colored metal, located in a vein underground, hidden very deeply, but it was still found by Ye Tian, and it can be said that it was lucky.

There may be other third-order supreme rule items here, but he doesn't have time to look for them now, and it will be easier to find them after comprehending the third-order supreme rules next time.

......

"Finally got rid of that ancient giant bird!"

Ye Tian breathed a sigh of relief.

All five of his replica bodies were killed, and this one escaped fast enough to get rid of the other party.

Subsequently.

His duplicate body left the Lost Domain directly, and then returned to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

After coming back.

Only then did Ye Tian take out this third-order Dao rule item.

The Innate Origin Domain Alliance had information on various third-order supreme rule items, and Ye Tian recognized this third-order supreme rule item after a little comparison.

Green Copper Ancient Gold, the third sequence of Dao rule items, medium quality, side effects are reduced cultivation, damaged foundation, reduced comprehension......

"The side effects are really big!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, he didn't care about the side effects, so he directly began refining the green copper ancient gold to comprehend the rules of the third sequence of the supreme path.

Originally.

His cultivation had reached the early stage of the Ninefold Dao Realm, but when he swallowed the green bronze ancient gold and comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Dao Realm, his cultivation was rapidly decreasing, and his foundation was gradually damaged, and his comprehension was also rapidly decreasing.

Fortunately, his comprehension decreased very slowly, otherwise he would not dare to guarantee that he would be able to comprehend the rules of the third sequence of supreme paths.

After a long time, Ye Tian's cultivation had already fallen from the early stage of the Ninth Rank to the Dao Realm to the peak of the Eighth Rank to the peak of the Eightfold Path Realm.

Continue to meditate and not care about these side effects.

Time flies, and unconsciously, thousands of years have passed.

this day.

Airplanes!!!!

Ye Tian's body was filled with the aura of the third sequence of supreme dao rules, and the cultivation of this copied body had also fallen to the middle stage of the eightfold supreme dao realm, and his foundation was greatly damaged, and his comprehension had also decreased a lot.

"Annihilation!"

The replica dissipated.

For Ye Tian, losing a replica body was nothing.

"Finally comprehending the rules of the third sequence of supreme paths, my strength has skyrocketed too much!"

Ye Tian waved his hand, and a wisp of the third sequence of supreme dao rules emerged, and this wisp of the third sequence supreme dao rules far surpassed the fourth sequence of supreme dao rules.

"Yes, you can continue to find trouble with the Ancient Giant Bird!"

Ye Tian said with a faint smile.

......

The Lost Realm.

Ancient Giant Bird Territory.

Ye Tian came here again.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian fought with this ancient giant bird.

Rumble!!!!

The third sequence of supreme dao rules was blessed on top of the fourth supreme dao supernatural power, and it erupted with terrifying attack power.

Under the blow, it directly shook the ancient giant bird.

"Yes, come again!"

Ye Tian attacked again and again, and launched a fierce battle with the Xuangu Giant Bird.

While!

One of the feathers on the wings of the Giant Bird was broken, which meant that the Ancient Giant Bird had been injured.

Soon.

Ye Tian's second and third replica bodies arrived and besieged the Xuan Bone Giant Bird.

The strength of the Xuangu Giant Bird itself was already inferior to Ye Tian, and now it was besieged by Ye Tian, completely declining, and even fell into a desperate situation.

After a long time.

Ye Tian finally hit the Xuangu Giant Bird hard, and the Xuangu Giant Bird didn't dare to stay here any longer, so he quickly escaped.

He chased after him.

After a while, the Ancient Giant Bird entered a nest.

As soon as he entered the range of this nest, his strength was greatly suppressed, and the ancient giant bird's injuries not only recovered, but also showed even more terrifying strength.

Wow!

Ye Tian came out of the nest, and the Xuangu Giant Bird stood in the nest space, stretching out a head, as if provoking Ye Tian.

"The Ancient Giant Bird even has such a nest, I want to kill it in its nest, but I can't do it. "

Ye Tian observed for a while and gave up completely.

Afterwards.

He began to collect the resources of the Xuangu Giant Bird Territory, and it did not dare to come out to stop it.

All kinds of precious resources fell into Ye Tian's hands like this.

"Hey, another third-order Dao rule item. "

"It's a pity that it's the Ancient Xuanshi, the low-quality third sequence of the Dao rules, and I can use it, and no one wants it when it is traded!"

Ye Tian put away this ancient Xuanshi and continued to collect resources.

All kinds of precious resources are in his hands, their value is too high, although some of them are useless to him, but he can exchange them for Eternal Solomon Gold Coins, and exchange them for Qiong Jelly to Dao Gold Liquid!

"Another third-order supreme rule item!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

I have to say that the territory of the Ancient Giant Bird is undoubtedly the best area in the Lost Domain, and the resources here are also the most, and there is even more than one item in the third sequence of supreme rules.

However.

When he completely scraped the third-order supreme rule items, he didn't find a high-quality third-order supreme rule item.

"Maybe a long time ago, there was a ninefold supreme dao realm that comprehended the rules of the third sequence of supreme dao, and he took the path of the strongest supreme dao, such a ninefold supreme dao realm, the strength is comparable to mine, and he definitely has the strength to deal with the ancient giant bird, and it is naturally easy to collect resources. "

Perhaps it was such a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm that took away the high-quality third-order Supreme Dao rule items, while the third-order Supreme Dao rule items that were born later were very rubbish.

However, he didn't care, any third-order Supreme Dao Rule item would be useful to him.

It's just that he still wants to obtain high-quality third-order supreme rule items, at least he can trade more low-quality third-order supreme rule items with other forces!
